title: DISCOVERY 3 — Eva's reaction
prompt: Medium close-up in @dream-house. @Eva bounces on her toes, hands clasped under her chin, eyes huge with excitement. The Dream House sits center-back, just out of focus. Eva (overflowing): "It's the BIGGEST house I ever saw! Can I see it, can I, can I, CAN I?!" Eva (turning to camera, hands up): "Pleeeease!" Bright morning light.
